patternCandidates.name: Meta-Memory Skills Framework
patternCandidates.description: Skills about HOW to remember. Core concept for JASON-OS memory.

patternCandidates.name: Skill Evolution Loop
patternCandidates.description: Mine failures, analyze, refine skills, propose new ones. Self-improving.

patternCandidates.name: Skill Bank 5-Section Format
patternCandidates.description: Description/Purpose/When to Use/How to Apply/Constraints. Compare against SKILL.md.

patternCandidates.name: Dual-Embedding Memory Bank
patternCandidates.description: Content + context embeddings per memory item.
patternCandidates.relevance_to_home: Concept portable, code tied to FAISS+PyTorch.

patternCandidates.name: Operation Templates with Meta-Info
patternCandidates.description: Usage + reward + EMA tracking for skill selection.

contentCandidates.name: 15 Memory Skill Templates
contentCandidates.relevance_to_home: Direct templates for JASON-OS memory operations. 8 conversational + 7 embodied.

contentCandidates.name: capture_activity_details.md
contentCandidates.relevance_to_home: Template for capturing activity details with temporal context. Applicable to auto-memory.

contentCandidates.name: insert.md
contentCandidates.relevance_to_home: Memory insert with duplicate avoidance, fact splitting, quality criteria.

contentCandidates.name: arXiv 2602.02474 (NOT FETCHED)
contentCandidates.relevance_to_home: Core theory. MUST read before T4 execution.

antiPatternCandidates.name: Academic code quality in production
antiPatternCandidates.description: 42KB monolith, zero tests, no version pins, unsafe deserialization. Extract concepts, not code.

antiPatternCandidates.name: Research artifact as dependency
antiPatternCandidates.description: Paper companion code won't be maintained. Extract knowledge, don't depend.
antiPatternCandidates.relevance_to_home: Plan for knowledge extraction, not library adoption.

cross_repo_connections.detail: Both involve autonomous agent improvement. MemSkill: skill evolution. Autoresearch: experiment evolution.
MemSkill provides the memory theory. notebooklm-py provides the skill distribution mechanism. Together they inform JASON-OS memory + distribution.
